visa_types.name: Work Visa
visa_types.documents_required: Please print out this Checklist and prepare the required documents accordingly, also prepare an additional copy of passport ID page for passport collection.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Work Visa]

Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Bangladeshi Taka is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- There is a service charge of BDT 9095/- (Inclusive of VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees.
- The Visa fee, payable to the Embassy of Austria can be paid in cash at the NRB Bank booth in the Austria Visa Application Centre, Dhaka with nominal fee of 413/- taka inclusive of VAT as payment processing fee.
- VFS Global charges (service charges & other optional charges) are to be paid in cash only.
- The visa application centre offers optional services at a nominal additional cost:

- 
[Table:  Work Visa]
- All Visa fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in Cash and Online in Bangladeshi Taka. (Inclusive of VAT).
- All fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
 This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work more than 90 days up to 6 months. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) is required.
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work more than 90 days up to 6 months. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) is required.
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Work Visa]

Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Bangladeshi Taka is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- There is a service charge of BDT 9095/- (Inclusive of VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees.
- The Visa fee, payable to the Embassy of Austria can be paid in cash at the NRB Bank booth in the Austria Visa Application Centre, Dhaka with nominal fee of 413/- taka inclusive of VAT as payment processing fee.
- VFS Global charges (service charges & other optional charges) are to be paid in cash only.
- The visa application centre offers optional services at a nominal additional cost:

- 
[Table:  Work Visa]
- All Visa fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in Cash and Online in Bangladeshi Taka. (Inclusive of VAT).
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Please print out this Checklist and prepare the required documents accordingly, also prepare an additional copy of passport ID page for passport collection.

## Photo Specifications

[Table:  Work Visa]

[Table:  Work Visa]

[Table:  Work Visa]

[Table:  Work Visa]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
Application Form for Visum-D
Sample Form

visa_types.overview:
Overview
 Student visas are given to bona fide students to pursue regular studies at recognized institutions in Austria. The visa is multiple entries and valid for the period of study as approved by the educational institution in Austria.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 Student visas are given to bona fide students to pursue regular studies at recognized institutions in Austria. The visa is multiple entries and valid for the period of study as approved by the educational institution in Austria.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Student Visa ]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Bangladeshi Taka is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- There is a service charge of BDT 9095/- (Inclusive of VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees.
- The Visa fee, payable to the Embassy of Austria can be paid in cash at the NRB Bank booth in the Austria Visa Application Centre, Dhaka with nominal fee of 413/- taka inclusive of VAT as payment processing fee.
- VFS Global charges (service charges & other optional charges) are to be paid in cash only.
- The visa application centre offers optional services at a nominal additional cost:

[Table:  Student Visa ]
- All Visa fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in Cash and Online in Bangladeshi Taka. (Inclusive of VAT).
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Please print out this Checklist and prepare the required documents accordingly, also prepare an additional copy of passport ID page for passport collection.

[Table:  Student Visa ]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
